top_signals.title: Wall Street Embraces Dollar as Warsh’s Fed Activates Bulls
top_signals.summary: The dollar is wrapping up one of its best months in a year as a raft of Wall Street banks see a turnaround of fortunes for the US currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chicago Fed President Goolsbee says inflation is too high; Williams sees price pressures easing
top_signals.summary: In a live CNBC interview from his home district, Goolsbee declined to speculate on where he thinks interest rates are headed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Panama Canal Sees Revenue Beating Forecast After Hormuz Closure
top_signals.summary: The Panama Canal expects revenue to exceed its $5.2 billion forecast for fiscal 2026 after the closure of the Strait of Hormuz drove more ships through the waterway connecting the Caribbean Sea and the Pacific Ocean.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Lower House committee approves flag bill in appeal to conservatives
top_signals.summary: The proposed law would prohibit publicly damaging, removing or defacing the national flag in a way that "causes extreme discomfort or disgust to others."
